title: Phaedo Consultation Request
description: The query an agent sends to phaedo_consult at a decision point (Phaedo Protocol v0.1 §10.2).

agent_credential.description: RESERVED for v0.3 authenticated agent identity (§10.5 / OQ9). Today `agent_id` is self-asserted; v0.3 will carry a signed per-agent credential here so a subject can scope `agents` honestly. Optional and ignored by v0.1 resolvers — declared now so the v0.3 addition is backward-compatible.

amount.description: Optional numeric stake (e.g. dollar amount) an authored policy's `amount_gt` threshold can match against (§10.5).

context.description: Free-form situational hints, e.g. { deadline_pressure, evidence_provided: [] }.
